category_sources: Official GNOME libsecret docs describe it as the Secret Service D-Bus client library.
source_facts.description: Library for storing/retrieving passwords and other secrets.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME documentation and source repository use the name libsecret.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Pages hosts the libsecret API and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNOME libsecret documentation lists https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libsecret as Source.
tags_sources: Official GNOME docs identify libsecret as a Secret Service D-Bus client library.
